parameters.content:
## SA_Load_Instructions Workflow (DYNAMIC)

Automatically discovers and loads ALL agent instruction files.

### Triggers:
- Manual Trigger (for testing)
- Webhook: POST /webhook/load-instructions

### Dynamic Flow:
1. Fetch shared/ folder files from GitHub
2. Fetch agents/ folder to discover all agents
3. For each agent, fetch their folder files
4. Build file list: agent files + shared files
5. Generate embeddings via OpenRouter
6. Upsert to agent_instructions table

### Rules:
- All agents get ALL shared files
- EXCEPT: personal_assistant has own actions files
  (so PA gets shared MINUS actions_*.md)

### Adding New Agents:
Just create folder in knowledge_base/agents/
Workflow auto-discovers it!

parameters.query:
-- Delete existing entry if exists
DELETE FROM public.agent_instructions
WHERE agent_id = '{{ $('Prepare Document').item.json.agent_id }}'
  AND source_file = '{{ $('Prepare Document').item.json.source_file }}';

-- Insert new entry
INSERT INTO public.agent_instructions (agent_id, source_file, document, embedding)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Prepare Document').item.json.agent_id }}',
  '{{ $('Prepare Document').item.json.source_file }}',
  '{{ $('Prepare Document').item.json.document.replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/\n/g, ' ') }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.data[0].embedding) }}'
)
RETURNING id;
